VulnerabilitiesDashboard.Title: S3 buckets should have block public access settings enabled
VulnerabilitiesDashboard.Description: This AWS control checks whether S3 buckets have block public access configurations enabled. The control fails if settings are permissive.
VulnerabilitiesDashboard.RemediationRecommendation: For instructions on how to lock down S3 public flags, review the AWS S3 Access Block Documentation.
